ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Deep learning framework used (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow) */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., ResNet-18) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* Dataset used for training the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "model_size_mb" REAL /* Size of the model in megabytes */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics like F1 score, precision, recall, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantization_techniques" (
  "quantization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantization technique */,
  "quantization_name" TEXT /* Name of the quantization technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quantization technique */,
  "framework_support" TEXT /* Frameworks that support this quantization technique */,
  "recommended_use_cases" TEXT /* Recommended use cases for this quantization technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being optimized */,
  "quantization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quantization technique used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model after optimization */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the model after optimization */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the model after optimization */,
  "test_set_used" TEXT /* Test set used for evaluating the model */,
  "optimization_date" TEXT /* Date when the optimization was performed */,
  "optimization_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the optimization process */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics like F1 score, precision, recall, etc. */,
  "environment_details" TEXT /* Details about the environment where the optimization was performed (e.g., hardware, OS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_quantization_id FOREIGN KEY ("quantization_id") REFERENCES quantization_techniques ("quantization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher belongs to */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model was uploaded */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "upload_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantization_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantization configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being quantized */,
  "target_backend" TEXT /* Target backend for the quantized model */,
  "scale_factor_type" TEXT /* Type of scale factor used for quantization */,
  "activations_and_weights_bit_width" INTEGER /* Bit width for activations and weights */,
  "bias_bit_width" INTEGER /* Bit width for bias */,
  "per_channel_scale" INTEGER /* Flag indicating per-channel scale */,
  "activation_quantization_type" TEXT /* Type of activation quantization used */,
  "bias_correction" INTEGER /* Flag indicating bias correction */,
  "quantization_date" TEXT /* Date when the quantization configuration was created */,
  "quantization_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the quantization process */,
  "quantization_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the quantization process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quantization_config_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_equalization" (
  "graph_equalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph equalization configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quantization configuration being graph equalized */,
  "graph_equalization_iters" INTEGER /* Number of graph equalization iterations */,
  "merge_bias_in_graph_equalization" INTEGER /* Flag indicating bias merging in graph equalization */,
  "graph_equalization_date" TEXT /* Date when the graph equalization was performed */,
  "graph_equalization_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the graph equalization process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_equalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_equalization_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES quantization_config ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quantization configuration being calibrated */,
  "calibration_size" INTEGER /* Size of the calibration dataset */,
  "calibration_batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used for calibration */,
  "torch_version" TEXT /* Version of PyTorch used for calibration */,
  "brevitas_version" TEXT /* Version of Brevitas used for calibration */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the calibration process */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the calibration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES quantization_config ("config_id")
)
